name: Mountain Crest Acquisition Corp. V
summary: PART I In this Annual Report on Form 10-K (the Form 10-K), references to the Company, Mountain Crest and to we, us, and our refer to MOUNTAIN CREST ACQUISITION CORP. V Introduction We are a blank check company formed under the laws of the State of Delaware on April8, 2021. We were formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which we refer to throughout this annual repo...
